title: Piquant Lazy Middle Eastern Chicken Skewers
description: A zesty, umami-packed chicken dish that pairs light, fresh green salsa with air-fried skewers, perfect for a quick hangover cure and Mediterranean-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Green salsa
ingredients.notes: mix of chopped cilantro, parsley, green onions, cucumber, lemon juice, olive oil, pinch of salt

instructions: In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, smoked paprika, ground cumin, garlic powder, dried oregano, sea salt, and black pepper until a smooth paste forms.
Toss the diced chicken in the paste until all pieces are well coated and let it rest for 15 minutes at room temperature.
While the chicken marinates, combine chopped cilantro, parsley, sliced green onions, diced cucumber, lemon juice, olive oil, and a pinch of sea salt in a small bowl to make the green salsa.
Thread four chicken cubes onto each skewer, leaving a small space between pieces.
Preheat the Lazy Susan spinner air fryer to 200°C and lightly spray the basket with cooking spray.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket and cook for 10 minutes, flipping halfway, until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Warm the green salsa in a microwave for 30 seconds or serve it chilled.
Serve the hot chicken skewers topped with a generous spoonful of green salsa and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
